mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND DATE(create_time) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount * 100), 0) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND DATE(create_time) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ums_member WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pms_product WHERE delete_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('month', create_time) = date_trunc('month', NOW())
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount * 100), 0) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('month', create_time) = date_trunc('month', NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND status = 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pms_product WHERE delete_status = 0 AND stock = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order_return_apply WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order_return_apply WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pms_product WHERE delete_status = 0 AND publish_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pms_product WHERE delete_status = 0 AND publish_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pms_product WHERE delete_status = 0 AND stock < low_stock
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ums_member WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ums_member WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURRENT_DATE - 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ums_member WHERE date_trunc('month', create_time) = date_trunc('month', NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('week', create_time) = date_trunc('week', NOW())
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount * 100), 0) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('week', create_time) = date_trunc('week', NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('month', create_time) = date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount * 100), 0) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('month', create_time) = date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('week', create_time) = date_trunc('week', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 week')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount * 100), 0) FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND date_trunc('week', create_time) = date_trunc('week', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 week')
